tasks.label: Install backend deps
args: cd /d "c:\Users\Tarun\Desktop\PNS MINI PROJECT" & .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r backend\requirements.txt

tasks.label: Build frontend (Vite)
args: cd /d "c:\Users\Tarun\Desktop\PNS MINI PROJECT\frontend" & npm install & npm run build

tasks.label: Run Flask (serves frontend)
args: cd /d "c:\Users\Tarun\Desktop\PNS MINI PROJECT" & set FLASK_ENV=development & .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m flask --app backend.app run --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5000

tasks.label: Rebuild frontend (weekly plan UI)
args: cd /d "c:\Users\Tarun\Desktop\PNS MINI PROJECT\frontend" & npm run build

tasks.label: Smoke test /weekly-plan
args: cd /d "c:\Users\Tarun\Desktop\PNS MINI PROJECT" & .venv\Scripts\python.exe -c "import pandas as pd, json, urllib.request; u=pd.read_csv('backend/data/user_health_profile_1000.csv'); uid=str(u.iloc[0]['user_id']); payload={'user_id':uid,'days':7}; data=json.dumps(payload).encode('utf-8'); req=urllib.request.Request('http://127.0.0.1:5000/weekly-plan', data=data, headers={'Content-Type':'application/json'}); out=urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10).read().decode('utf-8'); print('user_id=',uid); print(out[:900])"

tasks.label: Stop Flask (port 5000)
args: for /f "tokens=5" %a in ('netstat -ano ^| findstr LISTENING ^| findstr :5000') do taskkill /PID %a /F

tasks.label: Run Flask (serves frontend)
args: cd /d "c:\Users\Tarun\Desktop\PNS MINI PROJECT" & set FLASK_ENV=development & .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m flask --app backend.app run --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5000

tasks.label: Build frontend (Vite)
args: cd /d "c:\Users\Tarun\Desktop\PNS MINI PROJECT\frontend" & npm run build

tasks.label: Run Flask (serves frontend)
args: cd /d "c:\Users\Tarun\Desktop\PNS MINI PROJECT" & set FLASK_ENV=development & .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m flask --app backend.app run --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5000

tasks.label: Smoke test /weekly-plan (inline user)
args: cd /d "c:\Users\Tarun\Desktop\PNS MINI PROJECT" & .venv\Scripts\python.exe -c "import json, urllib.request; payload={'user':{'user_id':'demo_user','age':28,'gender':'Male','height_cm':172,'weight_kg':74,'diet_type':'Veg','activity_level':'Medium','allergies':[],'diabetes':False,'blood_pressure':'Normal','cholesterol':'Normal','oxygen_level':98,'hemoglobin':'Normal'},'days':7}; data=json.dumps(payload).encode('utf-8'); req=urllib.request.Request('http://127.0.0.1:5000/weekly-plan', data=data, headers={'Content-Type':'application/json'}); resp=urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10).read().decode('utf-8'); print(resp[:1000])"

tasks.label: Build frontend (Vite)
args: cd /d "c:\Users\Tarun\Desktop\PNS MINI PROJECT\frontend" & npm run build

tasks.label: Smoke test /foods (python)
args: cd /d "c:\Users\Tarun\Desktop\PNS MINI PROJECT" & .venv\Scripts\python.exe -c "import json, urllib.request; payload={'user':{'age':28,'gender':'Male','height_cm':172,'weight_kg':74,'diet_type':'Veg','activity_level':'Medium','allergies':[],'diabetes':False,'blood_pressure':'Normal','cholesterol':'Normal','oxygen_level':98,'hemoglobin':'Normal','goal':'Lose fat'},'limit':10}; data=json.dumps(payload).encode('utf-8'); req=urllib.request.Request('http://127.0.0.1:5000/foods', data=data, headers={'Content-Type':'application/json'}); out=urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10).read().decode('utf-8'); print(out[:600])"
